cards.title: Clinic Setup & Registration
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • BNYS practice registration: State council requirements
  • Clinic setup essentials: Equipment, infrastructure, signage
  • NABH accreditation: Standards overview
  • Revenue streams: Consultations, therapies, products, workshops

cards.title: Medico-Legal & Ethics
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Informed consent: Written, specific, voluntary
  • Medical negligence: 4 D's (Duty, Dereliction, Direct cause, Damage)
  • Patient records: Retention 3 years (adult), 25 years (minor)
  • Confidentiality: Exceptions (public safety, court order)
